title: synonyms.put_synonym_rule

set_id.description: The ID of the synonym set.

rule_id.description: The ID of the synonym rule to be updated or created.

synonyms.description: The synonym rule information definition, which must be in Solr format.

description:
Create or update a synonym rule.

Create or update a synonym rule in a synonym set.

If any of the synonym rules included is invalid, the API returns an error.

When you update a synonym rule, all analyzers using the synonyms set will be reloaded automatically to reflect the new rule.
